title: Maximum Subarray Sum After One Operation
titleCn: 经过一次操作后的最大子数组和

detail.title: Maximum Subarray Sum After One Operation
hints: Define an array dp[nums.length][2], where dp[i][0] is the max subarray sum including nums[i] and without squaring any element.
dp[i][1] is the max subarray sum including nums[i] and having only one element squared.
